steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The sentence begins with Knowing that flying insects keep their backs pointed toward sunlight during the day. The subject that follows must be capable of knowing that scientific fact.

steps.title: Make researchers the subject
steps.content: Choice B makes the theory the subject, and Choice C and Choice D make moths the subject. A theory cannot know something, and moths are not the ones drawing the scientific inference. Making the researchers the subject fixes the modifier. The answer is A.
